honest_framing: retrofit_policy_v1 is a design-search policy trained against the Seismo linear-elastic OpenSees simulator with HAZUS-fragility-derived labels. v1 uses documented parametric delta rules — not a re-simulation of the modified building — to update the response vector after each retrofit action. It recommends one action per step in a bounded episode; it is not an autonomous engineer and does not simulate collapse. All output must be reviewed by a licensed engineer before implementation.

cost_usd._source: order-of-magnitude planning values; not contractor estimates

delta_rules._description: Documented parametric response updates applied after each retrofit action. These are engineering-estimate placeholders, not derived from re-simulating the modified building. A v2 calibration pass should compare these deltas against actual OpenSees re-runs of retrofitted models.

add_damper._source: fluid viscous damper typical performance; FEMA 356 Table 9-1 range 15-30% per damped level

add_brace._source: concentric X-brace adding lateral stiffness; typical retrofit response in ASCE 41 Commentary

upgrade_column._source: ~20% section bump on all columns of a story; conservative estimate from stiffness scaling

fragility._source: HAZUS MR1 Table 5.9b, Life Safety damage state for C1M (concrete moment frame, mid-rise)
